literal: a choice or solution that combines elements from two distinct options

relabelled_senses.definition: Living and in good health; not dead.

literal: no literal meaning
to an extent that is complete and then some; more than enough or more than expected
every person; everyone without exception

suddenly; happening immediately and without warning

fully attentive and ready to listen; eagerly awaiting information, news, or an account
